title: ReportDetails
description: The full representation of an expense report

reportId.description: Unique identifier of the expense report

name.description: The name or title of the report

businessPurpose.description: The business justification for the expenses

startDate.description: The start date of the reporting period

endDate.description: The end date of the reporting period

policyId.description: The expense policy applied to this report

reportFormId.description: The form template used for this report

ledgerId.description: The financial ledger associated with this report

userId.description: The unique identifier of the report owner

isSubmitted.description: Whether the report has been submitted

isSentBack.description: Whether the report was sent back for corrections

submitDate.description: When the report was last submitted (ISO 8601)

reportVersion.description: The version number, incremented on each modification

customData.description: Custom field values on the report header
